choose.otherwise: AND ( SUBSTRING(p.created_region_code, 1, 2) = SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode}, 1, 2) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM residence rs WHERE rs.person_id = p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(rs.region_code, 1, 2) = SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode}, 1, 2) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id = p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(a.applicant_region_code, 1, 2) = SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode}, 1, 2) ) )

mapper.sql: p.person_id, p.name, p.gender, p.birth_date, p.id_card AS masked_identity_no, p.phone AS masked_phone, p.current_status_code AS person_status, r.household_id, h.household_no, hp.name AS head_person_name, hm.relationship, CASE WHEN h.head_person_id = p.person_id THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS household_head, r.region_code AS current_region_code, NULL AS current_region_name, r.registered_address AS current_address, r.status AS residence_status, f.floating_id, f.status AS floating_status, f.arrival_date, rp.permit_id, rp.permit_no AS masked_permit_no, rp.status AS permit_status, rp.valid_until AS permit_valid_until, CASE WHEN latest_in.last_in_date IS NULL AND latest_out.last_out_date IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN latest_out.last_out_date IS NULL THEN latest_in.last_in_date WHEN latest_in.last_in_date IS NULL THEN latest_out.last_out_date WHEN latest_out.last_out_date >= latest_in.last_in_date THEN latest_out.last_out_date ELSE latest_in.last_in_date END AS last_migration_date, CASE WHEN latest_in.last_in_date IS NULL AND latest_out.last_out_date IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN latest_out.last_out_date IS NULL THEN 'IN' WHEN latest_in.last_in_date IS NULL THEN 'OUT' WHEN latest_out.last_out_date >= latest_in.last_in_date THEN 'OUT' ELSE 'IN' END AS last_migration_direction

FROM person p LEFT JOIN residence r ON r.person_id = p.person_id AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN household h ON h.household_id = r.household_id LEFT JOIN person hp ON hp.person_id = h.head_person_id LEFT JOIN household_member hm ON hm.household_id = r.household_id AND hm.person_id = p.person_id AND hm.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN floating_population f ON f.person_id = p.person_id AND f.status = 'ACTIVE' AND f.current_flag = 1 LEFT JOIN residence_permit rp ON rp.person_id = p.person_id AND rp.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rp.current_flag = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT person_id, MAX(in_date) AS last_in_date FROM migration_in WHERE business_status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY person_id ) latest_in ON latest_in.person_id = p.person_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT person_id, MAX(out_date) AS last_out_date FROM migration_out WHERE business_status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY person_id ) latest_out ON latest_out.person_id = p.person_id

where.if: AND ( p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.id_card LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR h.household_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR rp.permit_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT h.household_id, h.household_no, hp.name AS head_person_name, hm.relationship, CASE WHEN h.head_person_id = #{personId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS household_head, h.status, h.address, h.region_code FROM residence r JOIN household h ON h.household_id = r.household_id LEFT JOIN person hp ON hp.person_id = h.head_person_id LEFT JOIN household_member hm ON hm.household_id = h.household_id AND hm.person_id = #{personId} AND hm.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE r.person_id = #{personId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT residence_id, person_id, household_id, registered_address, region_code, register_type_code, register_date, start_date, status FROM residence WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT floating_id, registration_no, status, current_region_code, current_address, arrival_date, planned_leave_date FROM floating_population WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND current_flag = 1
SELECT permit_id, permit_no AS masked_permit_no, status, issue_region_code, valid_from, valid_until FROM residence_permit WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND current_flag = 1

SELECT x.direction, x.migration_id, x.migration_type, x.business_date, x.from_region_code, x.to_region_code, x.address, x.business_status FROM ( SELECT 'IN' AS direction, in_id AS migration_id, migration_type, in_date AS business_date, from_region_code, to_region_code, from_address AS address, business_status FROM migration_in WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND business_status = 'COMPLETED' UNION ALL SELECT 'OUT' AS direction, out_id AS migration_id, migration_type, out_date AS business_date, from_region_code, to_region_code, to_address AS address, business_status FROM migration_out WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND business_status = 'COMPLETED' ) x ORDER BY x.business_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
